{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219124713399D0725734BFA8AF6"}"},"total":24},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7441065470247879486","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，对味，感情线要再细腻点就好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732511851,"group_id":"7430696529507142718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"精益求精 进无止境","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/9OUDr4dh2zw3PY4yXgBsva0eMiuECeWuOFN48I5N3/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e0aef1399004f0ead9d40a5e4497665~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708831&x-signature=ZQpUgQQNbQokxJACGpytXlnoi3U%3D","user_id":"4336128575420424","user_name":"要不我们摆烂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336128575420424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1738829073,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7430696529507142718","book_info":{"abstract":"（架空+多女主+无系统+人前显圣）
西汉元帝后期，奸臣当道、太监专权。昏庸的皇帝沉迷美色、妃子众多，无空挑选之下便把这个重任交给了画师！
妃子为了被皇帝看中，自然便贿赂画师以让自己的容颜在纸张上更加漂亮！穿越而来的关宁，便意外成了一名宫廷画师！
然而这看似美差实则并不好做，毕竟妃子各有背景与特色，谁又能在画中更甚一筹呢？
为了在这个即将混乱的时代活的更好，毫无背景的关宁只能以妃子为纽带，组建自己的关系网！
毕竟比画画，你们画的再好，有我一张写真引人注目？你们费尽心思，有我局部特写来的吸引眼球？对于拿捏好色皇帝，我比你们更有经验！
不过画着画着，关宁意外发现:昭君出塞的王昭君竟在其中？柔若无骨赵飞燕同样不甘落后，而那号称温柔乡的赵合德也欲同台竞技…
更有甚者，王莽、刘秀也即将踏上历史舞台！
好吧，既然是高端局，那我这个落榜美术生可要拿出看家本领了，我总不能让你们一个馒头卖五十万两银子吧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o012155e3f12d34759978aeb9513a5dd1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"南方黑芝麻糊","author_id":"","book_id":"7430696529507142718","book_name":"落榜美术生，竟穿越成宫廷画师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7430697105766761022","read_count":"69","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"130049"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"64","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,多女主,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o012155e3f12d34759978aeb9513a5dd1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361967&x-signature=YFiq%2FIv3TN7imcvQVeEB7SrgtFY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"456990684881439","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219124713399D0725734BFA8AF6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"st 为了在这个即将混乱的时代活的更好，毫无背景的关宁只能以妃子为纽带，组建自己的关系网！
